goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'north' and should be in the type of 'hotel'.
The hotel should have 'a star of 2'.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'theatre'.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
